calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Ilda V. Nostratis, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Eddah Villahermosa Abestillas and Reymund Villahermosa Panaligan, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Eddah marie villahermosa Nostratis and Reymund Villahermosa Nostratis.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Reset To Jul-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Ilda V. Nostratis, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Eddah Villahermosa Abestillas and Reymund Villahermosa Panaligan, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the required information on the Attachment to the Petitions, matter is continued to July 17, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for the Petitioner to file a Declartion relating to the missing information on the Attachment, the reason for the Petitions to change the name of the minors, and provide copies of Affidavit from each minor's father.
